positive: A whimsical and energetic depiction of a cosmic forest, where bioluminescent flora and fauna thrive under a deep violet and cyan nebula sky. The scene is dominated by graceful, arcing silhouettes of oversized, exotic leaves and glowing mushrooms, creating a strong, repeating pattern ideal for apparel. A central focus is a stylized, stylized crescent moon suspended among intertwining cosmic vines. The style is high-contrast graphic art, incorporating pointillism textures and linocut aesthetics, rendered with vibrant, clean saturation and deep blacks. Emphasize clean, scalable vectors and clear separation of shapes. Minimalist composition with maximum visual impact. Highly detailed, centered, symmetrical composition, clean lines, vibrant colors, art deco influence.
negative: blurry, low resolution, artifacts, noise, text, watermarks, out of frame, deformed, bad anatomy, extra limbs, human, signature, logos, trademarks
